task: Fix the three v0.2.0 UX bugs the chairman reported after the offline rewrite (event 000075): manual flip (not auto), bigger card (no stacking), vertically centered loaded view, and add 问 AI → DeepSeek share
summary:
Chairman: '虽然这是Flowntier的任务,但是你做的还不错,原谅你了,现在我给你汇报bug,1.没有动画,希望一张一张出。2.页面靠上而不是居中,'. Then: '可以手点翻牌,自由一些,然后牌大一些(不用很大,别堆叠),然后加入问ai(文本发给deepseek):抽完之后的页面下面从:再抽一张  三卡阵改为:返回首页 问ai,文本是卡牌的名字(顺/逆位),跟那个算卦的实现方法一样'. Then: '分享的格式都是:我抽取了塔罗牌,这是我抽到的卡牌:然后是你发的那些,最后是我要问的问题是'.

Bug fixes in v0.2.1 (all verified by re-build + re-install):

1. **Manual flip, not auto (chairman bug #1).** Removed
   the 3.1s Drawing state from TarotViewModel. The state
   machine collapses Initial → Loaded instantly. Each card
   in Loaded sits at rotation 0° (face-down) until the
   chairman taps it; tap triggers 0° → 360° Y-rotation over
   0.8s. A subsequent tap flips it back. AnimatedVisibility
   shows the '点击翻牌' hint until the first flip.

2. **Bigger card, no stacking (chairman bug #3).**
   Single-card view: 100×145 dp → 160×230 dp (~1.6×
   larger, the chairman's '160×230 推荐'). Three-card
   spread: 80×115 dp per card, spaced evenly with
   Arrangement.SpaceEvenly, no stacking.

3. **Vertical centering (chairman bug #2).** LoadedView
   wraps the card + button row in a Box(fillMaxSize,
   contentAlignment=Alignment.Center) so the whole
   block sits in the middle of the screen, not glued
   to the top. The verticalScroll parent still allows
   the chairman to scroll if the screen is short.

4. **问 AI replaces 再抽一张 / 三卡阵 (chairman
   update).** Buttons row in LoadedView is now just two
   buttons: 返回首页 (OutlinedButton) and 问 AI (filled
   Button, primary color). The 问 AI button calls
   DeepSeekShare.shareToDeepSeek(context, drawn).

5. **DeepSeek share integration.** New file
   apps/ChiefApp/app/src/main/java/com/thatgfsj/chief/
   share/DeepSeekShare.kt. Port of IChingOracle's
   com.thatgfsj.iching.ui.oracle.DeepSeekShare pattern.
   Share text format (per chairman spec — same format for
   both single-card and three-card-spread):

     我抽取了塔罗牌，这是我抽到的卡牌：

     [card body]

     我要问的问题是：

   Where [card body] is:
     - Single card: `<牌名>（<name_en>）<顺位/逆位>`
     - Three-card spread: 过去/现在/未来 labels with the
       same per-card format on three lines.

   Action: first tries the package-scoped intent
   (`setPackage("com.deepseek.chat")`); falls back to
   a generic chooser if DeepSeek is not installed; falls
   back to a Toast on ActivityNotFoundException.

6. **AndroidManifest <queries> for DeepSeek.** Added
   `<queries><package android:name="com.deepseek.chat" />
   </queries>` so Android 11+ package visibility lets the
   chooser see DeepSeek. Same pattern as IChingOracle.

7. **Terminology change (chairman directive).**
   v0.2.0 used '正位 / 逆位' (classical Chinese tarot terms).
   v0.2.1 uses '顺位 / 逆位' (the chairman's chosen
   wording — same orientation semantics, but more
   colloquial / shareable).

VERIFIED:
- ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug → BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 11s
- app-debug.apk = 15,142,620 bytes (15.1 MB, ~60 bytes
  more than v0.2.0 from the longer share text in resources
  + the added <queries> block in the manifest).
- APK copied to
  C:/Users/thatg/Desktop/ChiefApp-tarot-v0.2.1-debug.apk
- Not verified: emulator still not installed at
  O:/Android-sdk. Chairman installs on a real device.

BOUNDARY (NWT 000073 + 000071 still hold):
- chief-app is NOT a Flwntier GitHub release product.
- The deck stays baked into the APK; /api/tarot/draw
  on the runtime is for any non-chief-app client.
- Iching-oracle is still its own product — the share
  text format the chairman picked for tarot matches
  the IChingOracle's pattern (header + body + trailing
  prompt line) but the text content is tarot-specific
  (card names + 顺位/逆位, not hexagram names + 卦辞).

FILES TOUCHED:
- apps/ChiefApp/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml
- apps/ChiefApp/app/src/main/java/com/thatgfsj/chief/
    TarotViewModel.kt (Drawing state removed)
    ui/oracle/TarotScreen.kt (full rewrite)
    share/DeepSeekShare.kt (NEW)
- .nwt/timeline/000076.json (this file)
reason: Chairman bug reports after event 000075. Three UX bugs + one feature add (问 AI). All fixed in v0.2.1; APK at C:/Users/thatg/Desktop/ChiefApp-tarot-v0.2.1-debug.apk.
followups: 000076b: home page still sat too close to the top because the previous layout wrapped the whole screen in a verticalScroll Column (verticalScroll always pins children to the top of the viewport, so verticalArrangement=Center had no effect). Fix: drop the verticalScroll, restructure as outer Box(fillMaxSize) > inner Column(Top) > Header at top + Box(weight 1f, contentAlignment=Center) wrapping the state content. Home page buttons now sit in the middle of the screen.
